---
pagetitle: "Trishna Saikia - Contact"
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
comments: false
citation: false
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 0px
      sidebar-width: 0px

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/contact.css">

resources:
  - assets/contact.css
---

# Get in touch {{< fa envelope >}}

I welcome inquiries related to research collaborations, postdoctoral and visiting researcher opportunities, machine learning, trustworthy and human-centered AI, computer vision, multimodal learning, physiological computing, healthcare AI, remote physiological sensing, and student mentoring.
## Contact Information

**Official Email**
[phd2201101014@iiti.ac.in](mailto:phd2201101014@iiti.ac.in)

**Personal Email**
[trishnasaikia2521@gmail.com](mailto:trishnasaikia2521@gmail.com)

**Address**
POD 1C-III
Deep Intelligence Lad
Department of Computer Science and Engineering
Indian Institute of Technology Indore
Madhya Pradesh, India


## Profiles

<a class="link-dark me-2" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/trishnasaikia/" title="LinkedIn" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< fa brands linkedin >}}</a>
<a class="link-dark me-2" href="https://github.com/TrishnaSaikia" title="GitHub" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< fa brands github >}}</a>
<a class="link-dark me-2" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=G6G8ir0AAAAJ" title="Google Scholar" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< ai google-scholar >}}</a>
<a class="link-dark me-2" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3052-1689" title="ORCID" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{{< ai orcid >}}</a>

<br><br>

<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=phd2201101014@iiti.ac.in&su=Website%20Inquiry"
   class="btn btn-primary"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener">
   Send Email
</a>
